_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Joss Flame Economy Revelation. Canon event: Wang Lin discovers the Joss Flame economy — mortals are unknowing livestock. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Joss Flame Economy Revelation
canon_event: Wang Lin discovers the Joss Flame economy — mortals are unknowing livestock
why_untaken: Requires Spirit Severing+ to comprehend the truth; mortals cannot perceive it.
natural_next_event: The Joss Flame continues flowing to the Seven-Colored Daoist (until Wang Lin takes over).

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
